summary: This page records that the operating system includes internal capacity and continuity supports, but the public version deliberately abstracts the private contents.
final_use_case: Its value is internal continuity, not public display: it preserves operating context that can support later rooms without being mistaken for a finished public project.

instruments.instrument_name: Internal Operating Support Packet 003 Continuity Function
instruments.input: schedule, capacity, recovery, repetition, attention, or maintenance signal
instruments.operation: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.

instruments.instrument_name: Internal Operating Support Packet 003 Project Linkage
instruments.input: upstream work readiness, downstream project delivery, and continuity dependencies
instruments.operation: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. Keep the underlying packet private. If it ever becomes public, rewrite it as a separate professional specification with no private operating details. Use this entry only to explain that MuranoOS separates public project work from internal continuity systems, and that private-support packets do not become public evidence pages by default.
instruments.output: shows how the support function helps research and software projects continue

instruments.instrument_name: Internal Operating Support Packet 003 Privacy And Appropriateness Gate
instruments.input: private details, public wording, naming rules, and exclusion criteria
instruments.operation: Writing, rhetoric, narrative design, visual culture, and presentation. Use source library writing/visual/cinema sources to strengthen public exposition and Trilogy visual/storytelling logic. Vision: Make public pages read as curated intellectual exhibits rather than dashboards. Mechanism: Extract narrative sequencing, visual perception, close reading, rhetoric, style, cinema, and presentation mechanisms. Plan: Apply after domain-source routing so style clarifies evidence rather than masking weak evidence. Status.
